LanguageData.UB_SNS_ChildWizard.title: Young wizard
LanguageData.UB_SNS_ChildWizard.description: [PAWN_nameDef] claims to have been trained in herbology and charms in a mystical private magic school. Though this cannot be proven, [PAWN_nameDef] seems to be unusually adept at handling plants and calming animals, as well as whispering and occasionally chanting in an unknown language.
